title: Mayor Sharon F. Owens Announces the Return of Veo Fleet
summary: Mayor Sharon F. Owens announced the return of Veo's micromobility fleet to full capacity on March 9, 2026, following seasonal winter reduction. The 2025 program achieved 648,000 rides and 1M+ miles with 24% year-over-year growth. The 2026 operating agreement includes new cargo baskets, enhanced community education, accessibility improvements, and continued financial contributions to the city.

political_signal.description: Mayor explicitly frames Veo as aligned with city goals around safer streets, sustainable transportation, and equitable mobility (66% of riders lack car access; 52% use for transit connections). Demonstrates administration commitment to Vision Zero and multimodal transportation infrastructure.
